mapper.sql: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time from system_dept d
mapper.select: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, (select dept_name from system_dept where dept_id = d.parent_id) parent_name from system_dept d where d.dept_id = #{deptId}
select count(1) from system_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from system_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1

choose.otherwise: select * from system_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)

choose.when: SELECT count(*) FROM system_dept WHERE status = 0 AND del_flag = '0' AND position(#{deptId}::text IN ancestors) > 0;
choose.otherwise: select count(*) from system_dept where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)

mapper.select: where dept_name=#{deptName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into system_dept( dept_id, del_flag, parent_id, dept_name, ancestors, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, create_by, create_time )values( #{deptId}, #{delFlag}, #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{ancestors}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update system_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
mapper.delete: update system_dept set del_flag = '2' where dept_id = #{deptId}
